name: crabcode-security
description: Deep vulnerability scanning of your own trusted code, orchestrated inside your CrabCode session at a chosen effort tier, with every finding challenged before it is reported and the verification tally computed in code. Model inference uses the provider configured for CrabCode. Turns surviving findings into targeted patches, each verified by a panel of agents, that you apply when you choose. See the plugin README for the tiers, data handling, report format, and trust model.
